title: Crysis Remastered (1715130)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Crysis Remastered
- Steam AppID of the game: 1715130

## System Information
- GPU: RTX 2080TI
- Driver/LLVM version: 470.63.01
- Kernel version: 5.11.0-34
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/mikeysteele/0fc269124c837e6136fbfb273836957d):
- Proton version: Proton Experimental

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.


## Symptoms 
Game doesn't start and silently exits. This happens in all Proton 



## Reproduction
Try and start the game from the steam launcher
[steam-1715130.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/7189776/steam-1715130.log)

title: War Thunder (236390)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Warthunder crashing/bugs
- Steam AppID of the game: 236390

## System Information
- GPU: Gtx 1660 super
- Video driver version:  nvidia 550.54.14
- Kernel version: linux-tkg-6.7.9
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/JustCauseWhyNot/246f26cd36b62838fa1ce63ab68378bc/):
- Proton version: GE-Proton0-1-rtsp1

## I confirm:
- [X] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [X] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.



I've encountered three bugs.

1. When I try and click use mouse1 on any menu item it doesn't work unless I use mouse2 to select it.
2. Effects sometimes are visible through buildings, and with 9.1 I've noticed the effects are simply not how they're supposed to be. 
![2024-03-14_18-07](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/assets/58643844/464f9824-3040-4096-ba88-a00d9ad43c95)
![2024-03-14_18-06](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/assets/58643844/0ad7799d-237d-4609-8137-200e6c46ef21)
Here's another photo showing flares visible through aircraft despite being dropped behind it. Also not captured with screenshot is flares almost instantly becoming invisible
![2024-03-14_18-16](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/assets/58643844/fe2ed5c8-3e0d-444b-b2d2-612206a17f21)

3. At the end of a match when the game tries to load the post battle screen it freezes, and causes a crash.
 
## Reproduction
There's nothing super specific to reproducing these bugs. Just click around on menu, and play a match then leave it. You should then notice your game freezing/crashing. One key thing to note ist this is all tested using ultra low quality/old video card support. I've found it's more stable/less visual bugs.

title: ISLANDERS (1046030)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: ISLANDERS
- Steam AppID of the game: 1046030

## System Information
- Steam Deck, 512GB
- OS version: 3.3.1 Stable
- Proton version: 7.0-4

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms 

In-game exit button causes the game to freeze instead of closing it; cursor can still be moved and game can be shut down via overlay, but the game itself is unresponsive. No other issues noticed so far.

## Reproduction

Push the close button in the bottom left of the menu screen. Tried it a few times, has yet to not happen.

title: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six 3: Gold Edition (19830)
text:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six 3 Gold
- Steam AppID of the game: 19830

## System Information
- GPU: RX 7600
- Video driver version: Mesa 25.0.5
- Kernel version: 6.12.32
- Proton version: 10.0-1f

## I confirm:
- [x ] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x ] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms
Planning phase is broken. Mouse clicked doesn't place waypoints, but cycle floor instead.

## Reproduction
- Run the game
- Select Missions
- Go in the planning screen and place a waypoint
